title: SessionPointer
description: Pointer file. Names the currently-active session bundle under state/sessions/. Read first on every new chat. See tasks/TASK-004.research.md §B for the migration rule. The substantive per-session state lives at state/sessions/<active_session_id>/session.json.

active_session_id.description: ID of the bundle under state/sessions/. Null = no active session (idle between sessions).
